indication: OPDIVO in combination with ipilimumab is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with mismatch repair deficient or microsatellite instability-high metastatic colorectal cancer after prior fluoropyrimidine-based combination chemotherapy.
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized nivolumab in combination with ipilimumab for the treatment of adult patients with mismatch repair deficient or microsatellite instability-high metastatic colorectal cancer after prior fluoropyrimidine-based combination chemotherapy.

document.name: Opdivo (nivolumab) [product information]. EMA.
document.description: Bristol-Myers Squibb Pharma EEIG. Opdivo (nivolumab) [product information]. European Medicines Agency website. https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/documents/product-information/opdivo-epar-product-information_en.pdf. Revised June 2025. Accessed September 5, 2025.
